name: eBay Listing Compliance
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "eBay compliance errors give you more visibility over issues with your listings. At a glance you'll be able to see if there are problems with images, listing data, categories, or product identifiers."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "For steps on how to resolve these issues, please see our "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/690-troubleshoot-ebay-error-codes", "children": [{"text": "eBay Errors"}]}, {"text": " troubleshooting guide."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Turn on Compliance Settings"}], "data-id": "navigation-path"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "For Neto to display compliance errors on your listings, your account needs to be re-authorised through eBay."}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel navigate to "}, {"text": "eBay", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Setup & Tools", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click on "}, {"text": "Store Manager", "bold": true}, {"text": " to display the list of eBay accounts connected to Neto."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In the "}, {"text": "Tokens", "bold": true}, {"text": " column, look for any "}, {"text": "eBay Authorisation Token", "bold": true}, {"text": "'s which are invalid. These stores need to be re-authenticated, so click on the store name to see the details page."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": above, you will now be able to see any compliance issues with your listings."}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel navigate to "}, {"text": "eBay", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Active Listings", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Expand the filters, and change the "}, {"text": "Compliance", "bold": true}, {"text": " drop down box to "}, {"text": "Has Errors", "bold": true}, {"text": ". Now click "}, {"text": "Apply Advanced Filter", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/eBayListingCompliance3.05T5g00000v4acXEAQ.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/eBayListingCompliance3.05T5g00000v4acXEAQ.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "image3", "width": 700, "height": 248}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In the "}, {"text": "Compliance", "bold": true}, {"text": " column, click "}, {"text": "Show Errors", "bold": true}, {"text": " for each listing to see more information about the compliance issues."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/eBayListingCompliance4.05T5g00000v4a7QEAQ.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/eBayListingCompliance4.05T5g00000v4a7QEAQ.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "image4", "width": 700, "height": 248}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Variation products may have an error on one of the child products, so they will instead have a "}, {"text": "View Errors on Listing", "bold": true}, {"text": " link. Click this link to open the listing, so you can see which more information about the issue."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "To resolve the issues, please consult the "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/690-troubleshoot-ebay-error-codes", "children": [{"text": "eBay - Troubleshoot Error Codes"}]}, {"text": " help article for instructions."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]
